SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-16-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROSA RAMIREZ, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN REQUESTS THE PLAINTIFF, THE TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE, SHALL FILE A STATEMENT ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 19, 2019, CONCERNING WHY IT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER THE BALANCE OF ITS BILL FROM THE DEFENDANT NOTWITHSTANDING THE PROSPECT MEDICAL GROUP HOLDING AND THE CONCERNS THE COURT HAS RAISED HERE. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE STATEMENTS BY REGULAR MAIL OR OVERNIGHT MAIL ON THE DEFENDANTS IN EACH CASE. PLAINTIFF SHALL INCLUDE A PROOF OF SERVICE IN ITS FILING. DEFENDANT ELEEN SCHULZ MAY BUT IS NOT REQUIRED TO FILE RESPONDING STATEMENTS ON OR BEFORE MARCH 11, 2019. DEFENDANT MUST SERVE ANY STATEMENTS ON PLAINTIFF BY REGULAR MAIL OR OVERNIGHT MAIL; THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER OR REVIEW ANY STATEMENTS NOT SERVED ON THE OTHER PARTY, AND DEFENDANTS MUST FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE OTHER PARTY HAS SEEN THE STATEMENT. THE COURT DOES NOT ANTICIPATE REQUIRING A FURTHER HEARING. THE MATTERS WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED ON MARCH 11, 2019. NO COURT APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED ON MAR-11-2019.

(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: [X] THE REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. [X] EXPLANATION OF DECISION [X] PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO REFLECT COURT RECORDS JUDGMENT TO $505.97.
